Breakfast.meal: Moong Dal Cheela with Steamed Vegetables
Breakfast.description: 2 small moong dal cheelas (made with low sodium salt) served with a mix of steamed carrots, spinach, and green beans.

Lunch.description: 1 cup cooked vegetable khichdi (made with brown rice and moong dal, low sodium salt) served with a small portion of cooked moong dal.

Evening.meal: Apple slices with a sprinkle of cinnamon
Evening.description: 1 medium apple, sliced, with a pinch of cinnamon.

Dinner.meal: Mashed Sweet Potato with Palak Paneer
Dinner.description: 1/2 cup mashed sweet potato (cooked without added salt) served with 1/2 cup palak paneer (made with low sodium paneer and spinach).

Breakfast.meal: Moong Dal Cheela with Steamed Vegetables
Breakfast.description: 2 small moong dal cheelas (made with low-sodium spices) served with a mix of steamed carrots, green beans, and spinach.

Snack.meal: Buttermilk with a pinch of roasted cumin powder
Snack.description: 1 cup of homemade buttermilk with a sprinkle of roasted cumin powder for flavor.

Lunch.description: 1 cup of khichdi made with brown rice, moong dal, and low-sodium vegetables like carrots, peas, and potatoes. Served with a dollop of low-fat curd.

Evening.meal: Apple slices with a sprinkle of cinnamon
Evening.description: 1 medium apple, sliced and sprinkled with a pinch of cinnamon.

Dinner.meal: Mashed Sweet Potato with Steamed Broccoli
Dinner.description: 1 cup of mashed sweet potato (cooked without added sugar) with a side of steamed broccoli.
